current_wind.description: Light wind from the North-Northwest, with significant gusts.

wind_info.description: Headwind with a slight crosswind from the left

tips_rhbh.disc_recommendation: Overstable driver or stable disc with hyzer flip.
tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Use a strong hyzer release to fight the headwind and the slight push to the right. A controlled hyzer flip might also work for a stable disc.

tips_lhbh.disc_recommendation: Overstable driver or stable disc with anhyzer flip.
tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Use a strong anhyzer release to fight the headwind and the slight push to the left. A controlled anhyzer flip for a stable disc.

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Strong hyzer release to prevent turning over and stalling against the direct headwind.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Strong anhyzer release to prevent turning over and stalling against the direct headwind.

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Similar to Hole 2; use a strong hyzer release to combat the direct headwind.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Similar to Hole 2; use a strong anhyzer release to combat the direct headwind.

wind_info.description: Slight headwind with a touch of crosswind from the left

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Throw flat or with a slight hyzer to manage the slight headwind and gentle push to the left.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Throw flat or with a slight anhyzer to manage the slight headwind and gentle push to the right.

wind_info.description: Tailwind with a significant crosswind from the right

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Use an anhyzer release to counter the crosswind pushing left, letting the tailwind provide extra glide.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Use a hyzer release to counter the crosswind pushing left, allowing the tailwind to provide extra glide.

wind_info.description: Headwind with a strong crosswind from the left

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: A strong hyzer release is crucial to combat both the headwind and the push to the right.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: A strong anhyzer release is crucial to combat both the headwind and the push to the left.

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Overstable disc on a hyzer to fight the direct headwind.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Overstable disc on an anhyzer to fight the direct headwind.

wind_info.description: Tailwind with a crosswind from the right

tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Use an anhyzer release to ride the tailwind and counteract the push to the left from the crosswind.

tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Use a hyzer release to ride the tailwind and counteract the push to the right from the crosswind.

wind_info.description: Crosswind from the left with a tailwind component

tips_rhbh.disc_recommendation: Stable disc on hyzer or neutral disc with hyzer flip.
tips_rhbh.shot_strategy: Fight the push to the right from the crosswind with a hyzer release or hyzer flip, leveraging the tailwind for distance.

tips_lhbh.disc_recommendation: Stable disc on anhyzer or neutral disc with anhyzer flip.
tips_lhbh.shot_strategy: Fight the push to the left from the crosswind with an anhyzer release or anhyzer flip, leveraging the tailwind for distance.
